name: Madison Technologies Inc.
summary: part I . Summary Madison Technologies Inc. (Madison or the Company or we or us or our) is a Nevada corporation that was incorporated on June 15, 1998. Madison Technologies Inc. is seeking to create, develop and launch BlockchainTV (BCTV), the first-to-market 24/7 television broadcast and streaming communications network designed to bring the most up-to-date cryptocurrency information and entertainment to the masses in the U.S. and around the world.
